detail.instructions: Implement std::fmt::Display for EmailAddress by writing the stored email text.

hints.body: Display receives &self and a formatter. It should not consume the domain value.
A canonical solution delegates formatting to the private string.

detail.completionExplanation: Display exposes the public text representation without making the field public or adding unchecked construction paths. The type keeps its validation boundary while still fitting normal formatting APIs.

cases.name: direct-field-construction
